# DSTA and the RSAF Partner with Anduril to Explore Mission Autonomy for Manned-Unmanned Teaming

Singapore's Defence Science and Technology Agency (DSTA), the Republic of Singapore Air Force (RSAF) and Anduril Industries, Inc have established a partnership to explore advancements in mission autonomy for manned-unmanned teaming concepts.
